title: Seed Burn
description: Lets you use seeds as a fuel in furnaces
body:
Seed Burn

Lets you use seeds as a fuel in a furnace Each seed can smelt 1 item. Feel free to use this in your modpack. This mod is on other platforms. https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/seed-burn | https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/seed-burn Made with mcreator Mcreator.com
